/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/AudioRecorderTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/AudioEncodersTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/AudioDSPTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/PlatformAudioCaptureTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/AudioRecorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/AudioBufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/AudioCaptureCpp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/PlatformAudioCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/AudioEncoders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/AudioDSPProcessors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_recorder_tests.dir/Users/m1/Desktop/Naya/src/native/AudioRecord/AudioDSPFactory.cpp.o -o audio_recorder_tests  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgmock.a lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread --coverage lib/libgtest.a
